description: Redocly provides tools for API documentation, developer portals, and API lifecycle workflows such as linting, bundling, publishing, and API cataloging. Its products include hosted documentation and portal tooling plus open source CLI utilities for working with OpenAPI and related specifications.
summary: Redocly exposes a public MCP server at `https://redocly.com/mcp`, a documented CLI (`redocly` via npm/Docker) with CLI login and API-key-based push operations, and a machine-readable OpenAPI description for its generic Docs MCP interface.
